scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=251512 3720043571 2739 IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] s=SIP Call RV XT1000 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:4096 t=0 0 m=audio 3282 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 [$2] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv m=video 3284 RTP/AVP 97 96 b=TIAS:4096000 a=content:main a=label:11 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=42801f;max-br=8192;max-mbps=270000;max-fs=9000 a=rtpmap:96 H263-1998/90000 a=fmtp:96 CUSTOM=1024,768,4;CUSTOM=800,600,3;CIF4=1;CUSTOM=704,480,1;CUSTOM=640,480,2;CIF=1;CUSTOM=352,240,1;QCIF=1;SQCIF=1 a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=sendrecv m=application 3232 RTP/SAVP 100 a=rtpmap:100 H224/4800 a=sendrecv m=application 4000 TCP/BFCP * c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] a=floorctrl:c-only a=setup:active a=connection:new
